comment: Synthetic fit AML 1L patient, age 52, ELN intermediate-risk, NPM1+ / FLT3-ITD+ (allelic ratio 0.78). Engine routes ALGO-AML-1L step 1 (no emergency) → step 2 (no frailty/organ) → step 3 (no CBF) → step 5 (RF-AML-FLT3-ACTIONABLE fires via flt3_itd) → IND-AML-1L-7-3 (aggressive track; midostaurin 50 mg PO BID d8-21 added at REG-AML-7-3 component layer per RATIFY).

primary_diagnosis.disease_entity: Acute Myeloid Leukemia, FLT3-ITD-mutated (high allelic ratio) with NPM1 co-mutation, de novo

fitness_assessment.rationale: Age 52, no significant comorbidities, ECOG 1, normal LVEF/CrCl/bilirubin → fit for intensive 7+3

clinical_record.planned_regimen_notes: 7+3 induction (cytarabine 200 mg/m² CIVI d1-7 + daunorubicin 90 mg/m² d1-3) + midostaurin 50 mg PO BID d8-21 per RATIFY (Stone 2017); HiDAC consolidation × 3-4 cycles; alloHCT in CR1 strongly considered given FLT3-ITD high allelic ratio.
